title: callicarpa glabra
intro: Callicarpa glabra, also known as the smooth fruit callicarpa or purple fruit callicarpa, is a flowering plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to Southeast Asia and China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Callicarpa glabra include its ability to treat fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The herbal preparations of Callicarpa glabra typically involve making a decoction of the plant's leaves and roots, which can be consumed as a tea or used in traditional medicine preparations.
